svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="normal-user-usecase" id="normal-user-usecase"> <mxGraphModel dx="1262" dy="1091" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="actor_user" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;fontSize=16;" value="普通用户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="70" x="70" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_register" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="注册 / 登录" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="340" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_profile" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="维护个人资料" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="340" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_browse" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="浏览路线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="340" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_detail" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="查看路线详情" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="340" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_publish" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="发布路线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="650" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_upload_track" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="上传轨迹文件" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="930" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_upload_media" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="上传路线图片" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="930" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_comment" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="发表评论 / 回复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="640" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_like" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="点赞路线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="650" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_favorite" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="收藏路线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="650" y="435" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_ai" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="发起 AI 问答" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="330" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uc_observe" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="提交景观观测标注" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="320" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_register"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_profile"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_browse"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_detail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_like"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_favorite"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_ai"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor_user" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" target="uc_observe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc1" edge="1" parent="1" source="uc_publish" style="dashed=1;endArrow=open;html=1;fontSize=12;" target="uc_upload_track" value="<<include>>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc2" edge="1" parent="1" source="uc_publish" style="dashed=1;endArrow=open;html=1;fontSize=12;" target="uc_upload_media" value="<<include>>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc3" edge="1" parent="1" source="uc_detail" style="dashed=1;endArrow=open;html=1;fontSize=12;" target="uc_comment" value="<<include>>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc4" edge="1" parent="1" source="uc_detail" style="dashed=1;endArrow=open;html=1;fontSize=12;" target="uc_like" value="<<include>>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inc5" edge="1" parent="1" source="uc_detail" style="dashed=1;endArrow=open;html=1;fontSize=12;" target="uc_favorite" value="<<include>>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
